permit_fee_rate.note: RMI permit fee rate per decision 1523

hivun_375_default_sqm.note: Default equivalent sqm for standard nachla (2.5 dunam, 375 sqm rights). Must be calculated dynamically if non-standard.

usage_fee_residential.note: Usage fee rate for residential (non-priority area)

usage_fee_priority.note: Usage fee rate for residential in priority area (A/B/frontline)

usage_fee_agricultural.note: Usage fee rate for agricultural deviation

usage_fee_plach.note: Usage fee rate for PLACH (commercial use), based on commercial value

usage_period_3rd_plus_years.note: Maximum retrospective usage fee period for 3rd+ house (years)

usage_period_2nd_house_years.note: Maximum retrospective usage fee period for 2nd house deviation (years)

purchase_tax_rate.note: Purchase tax (mas rechisha) rate on RMI payments

betterment_levy_rate.note: Betterment levy (hetel hashbacha) rate: 50% of value increase

house_exemption_sqm.note: Permit fee exemption threshold for house 1 and 2 (sqm main area)

mamad_exemption_sqm.note: Permit fee exemption for first mamad per house (sqm)

standard_plot_size_sqm.note: Standard nachla residential plot size (2.5 dunam)

post_2009_deduction_cutoff.note: Only permit fees purchased after this date are deducted from 33% calculation (decision 979/1311)

A.note: Priority area A: permit/hivun 51% discount; purchase/split use reduced rates (not discount %); usage 3%

B.note: Priority area B: permit/hivun 25% discount; purchase/split use reduced rates; usage 3%

frontline.note: Frontline (kav imut): permit/hivun 31% discount; usage 3%. purchase_33/split rates vary - verify with RMI.

sqm_equivalent_coefficients.note: Coefficients for equivalent sqm calculation (nachla valuation)

permit_fee_coefficients.note: Coefficients for permit fee calculation by area type

yard_effective_max_sqm.note: Maximum effective yard area (sqm) before applying remainder coefficient
